description_long: This is a light commercial delivery van with a white exterior and prominent FedEx branding on the hood, sides, and rear. The van features a streamlined, modern body with a short hood, large windshield, and compact side mirrors. It has two front doors, a sliding side door on the passenger side, and two rear cargo doors, all with visible handles and seams. The wheels are standard steel with hubcaps, and the windows are tinted for privacy and security. The van's body is primarily made of painted metal panels, with plastic trim and glass windows. Its design is optimized for urban package delivery, offering ample cargo space and easy access through multiple doors.
description: A white FedEx delivery van with multiple doors, tinted windows, and prominent branding, designed for urban cargo transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the FedEx logo on the hood, large windshield, and compact side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the large FedEx logo, sliding side door, and two visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with the FedEx logo, rear cargo doors, and minimal window area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with sliding side door and FedEx branding.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
